projects.name: Forge Pipeline

projects.name: ForgeOrchestra

projects.notes: Workspace spun up today with full visual design system (obsidian intelligence, platinum blue accents). Skills installed: agent-team-orchestration, pipeline, calendar. Design guide complete.

tasks.title: Review flagged skills (workflow-engine, dashboard)

projects.name: Memory Stack
projects.description: Memory service/tooling framework imported from memory-stack.zip. Template/install/documentation kit rather than deployable app.
projects.notes: Downloaded and imported memory-stack.zip into workspace as memory-stack/. Reclassified from service/deployment review to framework/template review. Best adoption candidate: memory-stack/templates/files/PARA.md. Recommendation is selective/manual adoption only - do not run apply.sh wholesale against existing workspace.

projects.name: Trilium Cleanup & Organisation
projects.description: Trilium notebook reorganization at http://192.168.10.5:8080. ETAPI auth with plain Authorization header.
projects.notes: Confirmed Trilium reachable. Reorganized non-destructively by creating top-level buckets: 00 Inbox, 10 Infrastructure, 20 Services, 30 Code & Config, 40 Domains & Web, 50 Reference, 60 Tasks/Ops, 90 Archive. Moved notes under new buckets, removed old root branches after safe re-linking. Added second-pass sub-buckets for hosts, virtualization, networking, edge/proxy, providers, databases, notifications, docker compose, SQL, YAML config, web server config, networking reference, software reference, now. Cleaned up Servers branch and leftover root notes.
